since_last: 64% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.44%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC -0.07% · Gold +0.10% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 64% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.44%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.44%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.67%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +5.08%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +5.08%, AMD +4.57%, MU +3.88%, TER +3.61%, LRCX +3.42%. Laggards: CRNC -3.24%, SAP -2.47%, CRM -2.20%, INTU -2.15%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.03% at $125.27
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
